events.label: reasoning
events.text:
The scenario: residential electrical grounding electrode system, observed condition is "missing supplemental electrode", stage rough-complete. NEC 250.50 requires grounding electrode system with all available electrodes bonded together, including supplemental electrode for rod/pipe/plate electrodes if resistance is high (250.53(A)(2) supplemental electrode required if single rod/pipe/plate doesn't meet 25 ohms). Actually NEC 250.50 says if multiple electrodes exist they must be bonded. 250.52 lists electrodes. 250.53(A)(2) supplemental electrode required if a single rod, pipe, or plate electrode has resistance to earth of 25 ohms or more; a supplemental electrode shall be installed. Missing supplemental electrode is non-compliant.

Decision: fail. Risk: medium/high. Component conditions: non-compliant, installed-defective. Percent complete maybe 80. Confidence high.
